## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who is affected?

## Expected scope

- Atoms you expect this to touch (if known).
- Surfaces you expect this to touch.

## Acceptance criteria

What observable behavior marks this done?

## Risk / change-caution

Your best guess — the owning persona will finalize this during Stage 2
on the resulting PR.

## References

Prior ADRs, related Change Requests, upstream issues.
